title: Harvest Mod
description: You can right-click fully grown crops like Wheat, Potatoes and Carrots and get the crop plus seeds. The Crops will replant itself.
body:
# Harvest Mod Description

With this Mod you can right-click fully grown crops like Wheat, Potatoes and Carrots and get the crop plus seeds. The Crops will replant itself. 

### Information

Yes, there are other Mods, but I never liked that you can right-click crops the moment on you start the world. Now you have to earn this feature.
